visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young East Asian woman with dark hair tied back and a silver hairclip stands in a bustling indoor venue, possibly a convention center or a large store. She wears a white denim jacket over a pink top and has a yellow and red lanyard around her neck. She smiles and waves enthusiastically at the camera, gesturing towards the surrounding crowd and high industrial ceilings. (2) The scene shifts to a series of close-up interviews with diverse individuals. A blonde woman named Sarah wears a professional headset and speaks directly to the camera. Another blonde woman, Maria, wears a silver jacket and a plaid shirt, smiling brightly. Ilya, a woman with dark hair, stands next to the host, holding a microphone. The background remains a bright, open-plan studio or event space with modern furniture. (3) The camera focuses on specific design objects. Maria gestures towards a vibrant pink and orange circular rug with triangular patterns on the edges. A small wooden stool with red legs and a round wooden table with glass vessels are shown in a well-lit, cozy corner. The host is seen trying out a black shower chair, raising her fist in excitement. (4) The footage transitions to a home tour. The interior of a modern house is shown, starting with a living room featuring a large red sofa, a colorful rug, and a large potted plant. The lighting is natural and bright from large windows. A kitchen area with clean white surfaces and a view of a green suburban street with red houses is presented. (5) The final sequence shows a stylish bathroom with a round white sink, a wooden vanity, and a skylight reflecting a clear sky. The host appears again in a wooden-paneled room, speaking to the camera with high energy. The color tone is warm and natural throughout, emphasizing the aesthetic of the interior design.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 帶大家來問. [Variety]: 最滿意的作品 最滿意的食物 GO!!! (2) [Slogan]: 設計師的自介. [Subtitle]: 嗨我的名字是Sarah 我是IKEA的內部設計師. (3) [Subtitle]: 泥豪 我是Maria Vincke 即將上市的新品系列 OMMJÄNGE的設計師. [Variety]: (中文好好) 窩吃飽了 哇!!! 我去過台灣. (4) [Subtitle]: 哩賀 我是Ilya 我是幫IKEA工作的自由設計師. (5) [Variety]: 最喜歡自己哪個作品? 我喜歡我全部的作品. [Subtitle]: 是其中一個最喜歡的 是我們腳下這張地毯. (6) [Variety]: 這個超可愛的. [Subtitle]: 因為它是手工製作的 它運用了很多不同的技法 它是我的珍藏之一. (7) [Subtitle]: 我覺得 浴椅是最有趣的單品 浴椅. [Variety]: 正在測試浴椅的怪人. (8) [Variety]: IKEA裡面最喜歡食物? 霜淇淋. [Subtitle]: 霜淇淋信徒 霜淇淋信徒 霜淇淋信徒. (9) [Subtitle]: 我會選肉丸 (傳教) 瑞典肉丸 NO.1. (10) [Slogan]: 參觀IKEA設計師的家. [Subtitle]: 我最喜歡的空間是客廳. [Variety]: (千萬) 哦 真的蕭溫馨. (11) [Subtitle]: 我喜歡所有的房間 最喜歡的是廚房 而且我很喜歡下廚. [Variety]: (大大的窗戶) 太美了吧 (好想住在這!!). (12) [Variety]: (淡某) 我就是那個藝術.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female host, 5 designers (Sarah, Maria, Ilya, 2 males), and 2-3 background passers-by.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An East Asian female host with dark hair in a bun, wearing a white denim jacket, pink shirt, and a lanyard.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large exhibition hall with industrial ceilings followed by a Scandinavian-style home with wooden walls, large windows, and colorful IKEA furniture.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with the host speaking in an energetic, high-pitched Mandarin tone over a bright acoustic guitar BGM. Background chatter from the event is audible but muffled. (2) A sharp 'Whoosh' SFX triggers a transition. Sarah introduces herself in English with a calm, professional narrative tone, followed by Maria who speaks with a higher, friendly pitch. (3) A 'Ding' sound effect punctuates the transition to Ilya speaking. The BGM remains upbeat and constant. (4) As Maria describes her rug, her voice is expressive with rising intonations. A short, percussive SFX accompanies the scene change to the food discussion. (5) Multiple voices overlap as the designers share their favorite foods (ice cream, meatballs), punctuated by laughter and supportive vocalizations. (6) The acoustic texture shifts slightly to a quieter indoor ambience during the house tour, though the BGM continues to maintain the pace. The host's voice returns with a high arousal level as she explores the different rooms, accompanied by light 'pop' SFX for visual stickers.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Intro -> Interviews -> Specific Product Features -> Food Favorites -> House Tour -> Conclusion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a fast-paced, engaging look at IKEA's design philosophy and products through interviews with its designers and a tour of their real living spaces. It uses a social-media-friendly format with high text density and energetic narration to appeal to lifestyle and home decor enthusiasts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video prominently features IKEA designers, brand logos, and specific product names while promoting upcoming collections.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced social-media vlog focusing on interior design culture, combining professional interviews with personal home aesthetics.
